CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. The Membership Origin (e.g., New, Renewal) from the most recent won Membership Opportunity (by Close Date) related to this Account. Uses the Closed Won Memberships filter group.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The membership origin (e.g., New, Renewal) from the most recent won Membership Opportunity related to this Account.
CustomField.label: Last Membership Origin
